title: min-btc-node
description: A minimalist, lightweight Bitcoin node implementation built from scratch in Rust. Handles low-level networking and protocol rules.

title: nixos-config
description: My declarative NixOS system configurations and dotfiles, allowing fully reproducible developer environments and system states via Infrastructure as Code.

title: HomeLab Infrastructure
description: A domestic server that hosts various services such as a JellyFin instance, a Gitea instance, and Pi-hole. The server runs Unraid as the host OS and uses Docker for containerization.

title: Bagarre.io
description: Bagarre.io is a real-time multiplayer Agar.io-like game developed in JavaScript, leveraging WebSockets for low-latency server-client communication.

title: GameList
description: A web application built with Next.js that provides an interactive interface for displaying information about video games using the RAWG API, containerized with Docker.
